title: LegacyLands
description: A mod pack all about discovery and adventure. Explore landscapes of grandeur, experiment with the magics, and refine your metallurgy.
body:
A mod pack all about discovery and adventure. Explore landscapes of grandeur, experiment with the magics, and refine your metallurgy.

~ Using Fabric ~
The mods in this pack fall under 3 main functions that we have decided on: beautification, fantasy, and realism. For beautification, we will have things like Distant Horizons and Tectonic. Fantasy will encompass mods like RPG Series mods, More Magic Series mods, and Applied Energistics 2. Realism constitutes Serene Seasons, Snow! Real Magic!, Naturalist, etc.

I am creating this mod pack for use by friends, family, and members of the Legacy Club Volleyball organization, a non-profit group. We will be using this pack for fun.
If you somehow found this pack and would like to use it, feel free, just note that updates to the pack will follow our own agenda.

Note before downloading:
There are likely other packs that do things similar or better. I would encourage you to look towards prebuilt popular packs before considering this.
